title: National Internet Safety Review Bahrain
summary: Assesses internet safety, cyber safety, online risks and stakeholder responsibilities, providing non-binding context for online media and platform safety governance.

theme_notes.online_content.online_media_licensing: Review of internet safety and online safety issues in Bahrain.
theme_notes.online_content.content_standards_moderat: Internet safety white paper addressing online content risks.

notes: Related instruments: Related to TRA online safety initiatives and Information Technology Crimes Law
